chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 407 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General Syed Vizarat Hussain Zaidi, Advocate for Respondent No.3 >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< None present for the Petitioner. No intimation is received, although this is a date by Court matter. In view of above, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
